name: Cataclysmic Crusted Calcifida
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>楽</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>禍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>か</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カルクラグラ
desc: If a face-up EARTH monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, you can send 1 monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Cataclysmic Crusted Calcifida" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a face-up EARTH monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, you can send 1 monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Cataclysmic Crusted Calcifida" once per turn.
eff: If a face-up EARTH monster(s) you control is destroyed by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Special Summon this card from your hand, then, you can send 1 monster from your Deck to the GY. You can only use this effect of "Cataclysmic Crusted Calcifida" once per turn.

action: Activates if destroyed by card effect
Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
